display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
FIX PRIMARY CHANNEL FIRST
don't add channels to escape a broken core

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Budget available for minimum
viable test without starving primary?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
WAIT
test only when the budget is ringfenced from the working channel

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Brand creative assets exist
for the new channel format?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
BUILD CHANNEL-NATIVE CREATIVE FIRST
repurposed assets rarely perform - delay test

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Channel has observable
CAC payback under 12 months at test scale?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
SMALL PILOT only
set explicit kill-criteria before launch

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
RUN STRUCTURED TEST
6-8 week window with pre-defined success metrics and holdout
